parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort column. Allowed: id, Name, Code, Type, Status, Class, created_at. Prefix with - for descending (e.g. -Name)

parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Search by id, Name, or Code

parameters.name: filter_groups
parameters.description: Optional. Base64-encoded GroupedFilterSupport filter tree for advanced filtering
